title: SY5 0UF, Freemans of Newent Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/YP3621SE/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Freemans of Newent Limited Installation name: Pontesford Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/YP3621SE/A001  "
